sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114118" key="xlanidi/skion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλᾰνιδ-ίσκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114118.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χλανίδιον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.11</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλανισκίδιον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
